metadata.title: Recommended Practice (RP-036) Default Pan Formula
metadata.summary: MMA/AMEI Recommended Practice RP-036: Recommended Practice (RP-036) Default Pan Formula.

pan_formula.description: Sets the stereo position for notes of the specified channel. This message causes subsequent notes on that channel to be positioned anywhere in the stereo field from hard left (value 0,1) to hard right (value 127). It is not necessary to pan a note that is currently sounding. However, if a currently sounding note is panned, the panning shall be done without audible artifacts, clicks or “zipper” noise. Therefore, the effective range for CC#10 is modified to be 1 to 127, and values 0 and 1 both pan hard left. The recommended method is to subtract 1 from the value of CC#10, and saturate the result to be non-negative.
pan_formula.amends: The General MIDI 2 Specification (RP-024) is amended by this RP.
notes: Since MIDI controller values range from 0 to 127, the exact center of the range, 63.5, cannot be represented.
